patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Inter.
<Accordion> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, multiple, defaultExpanded, className, children.
<Accordion> variant must be one of 'light' | 'bordered'.
<Alert> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, title, icon, onClose, children.
<Alert> variant must be one of 'default' | 'accent' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: src, name, icon, color, size, radius, isBordered.
<Avatar> color must be one of 'default' | 'accent' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<Avatar> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Avatar> radius must be one of 'full' | 'square'.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: content, color, dot, placement, isInvisible, children.
<Badge> color must be one of 'danger' | 'accent' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'default'.
<Badge> placement must be one of 'top-right' | 'bottom-right' | 'top-left'.
<Crumb> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, href.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, size, startContent, endContent, fullWidth, iconOnly, as, children.
<ButtonGroup> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: orientation, children.
<ButtonGroup> orientation must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<Card> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, isHoverable, children.
<Card> variant must be one of 'elevated' | 'bordered' | 'flat'.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, description, isSelected, defaultSelected, isIndeterminate, isDisabled, onChange.
<Chip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: variant, color, size, withDot, onClose, startContent, children.
<Chip> variant must be one of 'solid' | 'soft' | 'outline'.
<Chip> color must be one of 'default' | 'accent' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<Chip> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Dropdown> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: trigger, align, className, children.
<Dropdown> align must be one of 'start' | 'end'.
<DuotoneIcon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, color, secondaryColor.
<Icon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, children.
<Input> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, description, errorMessage, isInvalid, isRequired, size, startContent, endContent, isDisabled.
<Input> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Kbd> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: keys, children.
<Label> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: isRequired, children.
<Link> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: color, underline, isExternal, showAnchorIcon, children.
<Link> color must be one of 'accent' | 'foreground' | 'muted'.
<Modal> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: isOpen, onClose, title, description, footer, size, showClose, children.
<Modal> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'.
<Pagination> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: total, page, defaultPage, onChange.
<PopoverRender> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: close.
<ProgressBar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, min, max, label, showValue, color, size, formatValue.
<ProgressBar> color must be one of 'accent' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<ProgressBar> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<ProgressCircle> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, size, thickness, color, showValue.
<ProgressCircle> color must be one of 'accent' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<Radio> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, description, value, isDisabled.
<SelectOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label.
<Skeleton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: width, height, radius, circle.
<Slider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, defaultValue, min, max, step, formatValue, showValue, onChange, className.
<Spinner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: size, color.
<Spinner> color must be one of 'accent' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'current'.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, size, isSelected, defaultSelected, isDisabled, onChange.
<Switch> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<TabItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: key, title, icon, content, isDisabled.
<Textarea> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, description, errorMessage, isInvalid, isRequired.
<Tooltip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: content, placement, children.
<Tooltip> placement must be one of 'top' | 'bottom'.
